headline: Tech rebound lifts Dow to record, yen hits 40-year low against dollar
summary: Resurgent tech stocks helped lift the Dow to a fresh record Monday as oil prices advanced and the yen retreated to a 40-year low against the dollar.The Dow climbed 0.6 percent to a fresh record, while the tech-focused Nasdaq jumped more than two percent.

raw.headline: Tech rebound lifts Dow to record, yen hits 40-year low against dollar
raw.summary: Resurgent tech stocks helped lift the Dow to a fresh record Monday as oil prices advanced and the yen retreated to a 40-year low against the dollar.The Dow climbed 0.6 percent to a fresh record, while the tech-focused Nasdaq jumped more than two percent.

headline: The Margin Squeeze Threatening Intel Stock
summary: If you hold Intel (INTC) stock, you’ve had a strong year. The shares have posted a 478% gain over the last 12 months, and the narrative has shifted in the company’s favor. Management now sees “clear signs that the CPU is reinserting itself as the indispensable foundation of the AI era.” The market has bought into this comeback story, with the stock trading near 91% of its 52-week high.

headline: The Real Price Of Intel Stock Is Three Years Away
summary: At a glance, Intel (INTC) stock looks expensive. Trading around $128.32, the shares command a multiple of about 118x this year’s expected earnings. For many investors, that’s where the analysis stops. A triple-digit price-to-earnings ratio is often a dealbreaker, suggesting a price tag that has far outrun the business fundamentals.

headline: Tesla’s 10% Weight in ARKK Sets Up a Make-or-Break Year for the Innovation ETF
summary: The ARK Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA:ARKK) has barely moved this year, gaining about 2% year to date through late June and sitting at roughly $78 per share. That stasis hides a violent tug of war inside the portfolio: AMD has more than doubled, up 144% YTD, while Coinbase has shed 34% and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA), ARKK’s largest ... Tesla’s 10% Weight in ARKK Sets Up a Make-or-Break Year for the Innovation ETF

headline: Super Micro Office Raided as Taiwan Expands Chip Smuggling Probe
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Super Micro Computer Inc.’s offices in Taiwan were raided by government authorities on Monday, widening an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia Corp. chips into China using the company’s servers, according to a person familiar with the situation. headline: Wall Street Just Supersized Its Price Target on Intel. Is the Stock Still Too Cheap?
summary: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) stock is trading at $130.60 midday Monday, up 2% on the session. The move follows a major price-target hike from Cantor Fitzgerald, which raised its target on the shares to $150 from $90 while keeping its rating at Neutral. That nuance matters. A supersized target without a rating change signals strong conviction in ... Wall Street Just Supersized Its Price Target on Intel. Is the Stock Still Too Cheap?

headline: ByteDance targets CPU mass production in H2 2027 to power AI push - SCMP
summary: Investing.com -- ByteDance is racing to finalize the design of a next-generation in-house CPU by early 2027 at the latest, with mass production and wider deployment targeted for the second half of that year, South China Morning Post reported Monday, citing three people familiar with the matter. The disclosure, the first of its kind for the TikTok parent, underscores how urgently one of the world's most valuable private tech companies is building out its own silicon stack to sustain explosive gro

headline: Micron Stock: Let's Talk About Those Long-Term Contracts
summary: Micron (MU) just reported blockbuster Q3 earnings. Revenue surged 4x year-over-year, earnings per share jumped 15x, and gross margins hit a massive 84.6%. The reasons are straightforward: an unprecedented AI buildout has driven explosive demand and pricing for high-bandwidth memory that sits alongside AI accelerators from the likes of Nvidia (NVDA) and AMD (AMD), with the supply crunch spilling into the broader memory market, too.

headline: What SpaceX's addition to the Russell 1000 means for the index
summary: After the close of trading on June 26, SpaceX was added to the Russell 1000 as the index rebalanced. Now, a slew of ETFs will now have to buy the stock to stay aligned with the index. Arne Noack, head of equity and multi-asset indices for Americas at FTSE Russell, joins CNBC's Dominic Chu on "Halftime Report" to discuss.

headline: Is AMD’s (AMD) Russell Top 50 Move Reframing Its AI Infrastructure Investment Story?
summary: In late June 2026, Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. was removed from several Russell value benchmarks but was simultaneously added to the Russell Top 50 Index, reflecting a shift in how the market classifies the company’s profile within major equity indices. At the same time, AMD has been deepening its role in enterprise AI infrastructure through moves such as its phased 30 MW deployment agreement with Rackspace Technology and its acquisition of AI-driven memory optimization start-up MEXT.
